name: Knock
description: Knock is a notifications infrastructure platform. Trigger notification workflows, manage users and their preferences, track message delivery, build in-app feeds, and manage objects that can receive notifications.

capabilities.name: workflows_trigger
capabilities.description: Trigger a notification workflow for one or more recipients.

capabilities.name: workflows_cancel
capabilities.description: Cancel queued or in-progress workflow runs.

capabilities.name: users_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific user by their ID.

capabilities.name: users_list
capabilities.description: List all users in the environment.

capabilities.name: users_identify
capabilities.description: Create or update a user with identification data (name, email, phone, etc.).

capabilities.name: users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete a user and all their data.

capabilities.name: users_merge
capabilities.description: Merge two user profiles into one, combining their data.

capabilities.name: users_messages_list
capabilities.description: List messages for a specific user.

capabilities.name: users_preferences_get
capabilities.description: Get notification preferences for a user.

capabilities.name: users_preferences_update
capabilities.description: Update notification preferences for a user.

capabilities.name: users_feed_get
capabilities.description: List in-app feed items for a user on a specific feed channel.

capabilities.name: users_channel_data_get
capabilities.description: Get channel-specific data for a user (e.g., push tokens).

capabilities.name: users_channel_data_set
capabilities.description: Set channel-specific data for a user (e.g., device tokens for push).

capabilities.name: users_channel_data_delete
capabilities.description: Delete channel-specific data for a user.

capabilities.name: messages_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific message by its ID.

capabilities.name: messages_list
capabilities.description: List messages for the current environment with optional filtering.

capabilities.name: messages_content_get
capabilities.description: Get the fully rendered content of a message.

capabilities.name: messages_events_list
capabilities.description: List delivery events for a message.

capabilities.name: messages_mark_read
capabilities.description: Mark a message as read.

capabilities.name: messages_mark_unread
capabilities.description: Mark a message as unread.

capabilities.name: messages_mark_seen
capabilities.description: Mark a message as seen.

capabilities.name: messages_archive
capabilities.description: Archive a message.

capabilities.name: messages_batch_read
capabilities.description: Batch mark multiple messages as read.

capabilities.name: objects_set
capabilities.description: Create or update an object in a collection (e.g., a project or team).

capabilities.name: objects_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific object from a collection.

capabilities.name: objects_list
capabilities.description: List all objects in a collection.

capabilities.name: objects_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete an object from a collection.

capabilities.name: objects_subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List subscriptions for an object (users subscribed to it).

capabilities.name: objects_subscriptions_add
capabilities.description: Add subscriptions to an object for specified recipients.

capabilities.name: objects_subscriptions_delete
capabilities.description: Remove subscriptions from an object.

capabilities.name: bulk_users_identify
capabilities.description: Identify (create or update) up to 1,000 users in a single request.

capabilities.name: bulk_users_delete
capabilities.description: Permanently delete up to 1,000 users at a time.

capabilities.name: users_schedules_list
capabilities.description: List notification schedules for a user.

capabilities.name: users_subscriptions_list
capabilities.description: List all topic subscriptions for a user.
